title: red eyes
description: Equip the “Red Eye” item to add a glowing red eye overlay to your skin. Includes a visual editor for eye position, size, color, glow intensity, and a pixel editor for customizing left/right eye shapes. Forge 1.20.1 compatible; optional Curios support.
body:
# Red Eyes
![red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/522a9e4ce534c04c9fe24d7abab9f1f45932dff7.png)
**Red Eyes** is a cosmetic Forge mod for Minecraft 1.20.1. Equipping the **Red Eye** item overlays a bright, glowing red eye effect onto your skin, giving your character a mysterious and striking appearance.
![red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d9de8818e489fd472752c0798ef8dc9eeb9b4b4.png)
![red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/571614ee94a7f4ad5f08463e249d5c5794f829c4.png)
## Features
- Glowing red eye overlay on player skin.
- 3D preview based on your skin.
- Adjustable eye position, spacing, length, thickness.
- Adjustable glow range, glow intensity, RGB color.
- Pixel editor for fully customizing left/right eye shapes.
- Copy left ↔ right eye, clear current eye, restore default.
- Toggle red eye display on/off.
- Optional Curios head slot support.
- Configuration saved to client files.

## Usage
Obtain the **Red Eye** item. Since no crafting recipe exists yet, use Creative Mode or:

Equip in the head slot (or Curios head slot if installed) to display the effect.

**Keybindings**
- `O` – Open Red Eye editor
- `P` – Toggle Red Eye display

Adjust position, color, glow, and shape in the editor. Click **Save** to apply changes.

## Notes
1. Forge 1.20.1 required.
2. Curios API optional.
3. Cosmetic only; does not affect stats or combat.
4. Adjust "Texture Distance" if red eye flickers or overlaps with skin.

## Changelog
**1.0.0**
- Initial release.
- Added Red Eye item and glowing effect.
- Visual editor with full customization.
- Optional Curios support.
- Keybindings for editor and toggle.
- Multilingual support: English and Chinese.
